hero.body: We fund local projects, events, and contributors creating spaces for learning, experimentation, and coordination on the road to Devcon 8 India.

applications_closed.heading: Round 1 has now closed
applications_closed.thank_you: Thank you to everyone who submitted an application!

community_banner.cta_prefix: Join us, bring your ideas and let's build Devcon

ecosystem_needs.heading: What the Ecosystem needs
ecosystem_needs.intro: As Ethereum continues to grow, there is a need to make the ecosystem more accessible, connected, and grounded in its core values. This program responds to that need by:

bullets.rest: for new and diverse audiences, lowering barriers to entry through education, experimentation, and local initiatives

bullets.strong: Bridging Ethereum with other industries and communities
bullets.rest: , creating spaces where its infrastructure can be explored in real-world contexts

bullets.strong: Promoting and putting into practice Ethereum's core values and CROPS
bullets.rest: : Censorship Resistance, Open Source, Privacy, and Security, through hands-on experiences

what_you_can_receive.heading: What you can receive
bullets: Visibility and amplification across Devcon channels
Devcon tickets (free or discounted - maximum of 5) based on contribution and availability

budget_note.note_body: The program will run in two waves. In Wave 1, we prioritize initiatives with the greatest impact.
budget_note.footer_prefix: After applying, please wait for our response —
budget_note.footer_strong: we'll get back to you within 7 days

other_support.heading: Discount applications
other_support.body_intro_suffix: , reward meaningful contributions, and support initiatives with clear ecosystem impact.

bullets.prefix: Discounted prices increase over time. Applying earlier gives access to

other_support.body_outro: Ticket options unlock on different dates and are limited spots per round. Please check availability and release dates.

faq.q: Who can apply for a discounted ticket?
faq.a: Discounted tickets are available through applications for students, builders, and ecosystem contributors. Each category has its own eligibility criteria and pricing. Applications are reviewed and tickets are limited per round.
